{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211400156EF9D3EB7870D03F512A"}"},"total":93},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7471842670890713881","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"喜欢看真实事件报导，作者作为业内人，资料齐全，情节完整，没有废活，对了解人性中的恶的一面很有帮助。只是书名太俗了，要不是看过他的另一部书，我都冲书名直接略过。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739677241,"group_id":"7347954458908707864","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzou6fYPbCU4MeccjCmbFKM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"102895827792","user_name":"浪与岛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102895827792","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7347954458908707864","book_info":{"abstract":"我是一名公安部档案员，在多年的档案整理过程中，见证了办案人员的不易，也了解了更多不为人知的细节。
本书将从每一本卷宗里的照片、口供、走访调查、新闻采访……等各个角度，尽可能为你真实的还原案件本来面目。
每一起案件都是真实发生，每一个犯罪分子，都把人性的罪恶体现的淋漓尽致，违法犯罪不要做，人间正道是沧桑。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/44edba207578de1c7a210ee50e0f2e15","author":"甜柔","author_id":"","book_id":"7347954458908707864","book_name":"中国刑侦要案实录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7351647142827541016","read_count":"12624","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2006580"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"930","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cf1ae8a34cc3e472504998dc2f2de353~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256815&x-signature=IGAFvvfU4Wp5gD0CLd2PG7C5%2BDk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102205118054","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"330"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211400156EF9D3EB7870D03F512A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读27小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":25574,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":97092,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4028},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comme
